ogTitle: Glen Allyn vs Glen Aplin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Allyn and Glen Aplin.
heading: Glen Allyn vs Glen Aplin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Allyn, Queensland and Glen Aplin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Allyn has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Glen Aplin (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Allyn or Glen Aplin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Allyn has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Glen Aplin scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Allyn scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Aplin scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Allyn or Glen Aplin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Allyn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
